links.title: Overview
links.tooltip: Open the overview with the current time range.

links.title: SLO Health
links.tooltip: Open SLO scorecards, burn rates, and alert thresholds with the current time range.

links.title: Errors
links.tooltip: Open parsed failure logs and trace links.

links.title: Trace Journey
links.tooltip: Open trace/log drill-downs for propagation failures.

panels.description: Recent ObservMe handler activity from observme_events_observed_total. A zero value means the selected range is idle or no matching events have been observed; use the adjacent failure chips to distinguish healthy idle from unhealthy export behavior.
panels.title: Observed event liveness

panels.description: Composite runtime export state: 1 (green) means active telemetry with no local drops, export errors, or redaction failures; 0.5 (blue) means idle or unobserved telemetry with no failures; values below 1 indicate active failures, and 0 indicates failures without observed-event liveness. Use the adjacent liveness and failure chips to distinguish idle from missing instrumentation.

targets.expr: clamp_max(((((sum(rate(observme_events_observed_total[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) > bool 0) * clamp_min(1 - (((sum(rate(observme_telemetry_dropped_total[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(observme_export_errors_total[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(observme_redaction_failures_total[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0))) / clamp_min((sum(rate(observme_events_observed_total[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)), 1e-9)), 0)) + (((sum(rate(observme_events_observed_total[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) == bool 0) * (((sum(rate(observme_telemetry_dropped_total[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(observme_export_errors_total[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(observme_redaction_failures_total[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0))) == bool 0) * 0.5)), 1)

panels.title: Collector/export health

panels.description: Local telemetry drop ratio for the selected window, bounded to 100%. Zero means no drops were observed; when event liveness is also zero, treat it as idle/unmeasured rather than proof of active health.
panels.title: Telemetry drop ratio

panels.description: Exporter/backend error rate. Zero means no export errors were observed; when event liveness is also zero, treat the range as idle/unmeasured rather than proof of active health.
panels.title: Export error rate

panels.description: Redaction failure rate. Any non-zero value is critical when content capture is enabled. Zero means no failures were observed; when event liveness is also zero, treat the range as idle/unmeasured.
panels.title: Redaction failure rate

panels.description: Instrumentation overhead chip: p99 handler lifecycle latency should stay under the 10 ms SLO threshold. No histogram observations render as no data rather than a false healthy zero.
panels.title: Handler p99 latency

panels.description: 30-day Observability Export SLO aligned with observme-slos.yaml: 99% of observed events are not locally dropped. The denominator guard makes no events and no drops evaluate to 1; treat that state as idle/unmeasured and confirm liveness instead of assuming a measured healthy workload.
panels.title: Observability Export SLO (30d)

panels.description: Instrumentation Overhead SLO scorecard: p99 handler duration over 30 days should stay under 10 ms. No histogram observations render as no data rather than a false healthy zero.
panels.title: Instrumentation Overhead SLO p99 (30d)

panels.description: Short-window burn rates normalized by a 1% error budget. Values above 1 consume error budget faster than target.

targets.expr: clamp_max(clamp_min(((sum(rate(observme_handler_duration_ms_count[1h])) or vector(0)) - (sum(rate(observme_handler_duration_ms_bucket{le="10"}[1h])) or vector(0))) / clamp_min((sum(rate(observme_handler_duration_ms_count[1h])) or vector(0)), 1e-9), 0), 1) / 0.01

panels.title: Runtime SLO burn rate (1h)

panels.description: Long-window burn rates normalized by a 1% error budget. Pair with the 1h view to identify sustained SLO risk.

targets.expr: clamp_max(clamp_min(((sum(rate(observme_handler_duration_ms_count[30d])) or vector(0)) - (sum(rate(observme_handler_duration_ms_bucket{le="10"}[30d])) or vector(0))) / clamp_min((sum(rate(observme_handler_duration_ms_count[30d])) or vector(0)), 1e-9), 0), 1) / 0.01

panels.title: Runtime SLO burn rate (30d)

panels.description: Alert thresholds mirrored from dashboards/observme-alerts.yaml for quick operational context.

options.content:
### Alert threshold reference

- **ObservMeExportDropsDetected:** any local telemetry drops for 5m.
- **ObservMeRedactionFailures:** any redaction failures for 5m.
- **ObservMeTraceContextPropagationFailures:** any trace-context propagation failures for 10m.
- **ObservMeActiveAgentsStuckHigh:** active agents > **100** for 30m.
- Agent orchestration thresholds: p95 fan-out > **20** and p95 tree depth > **5** for 10m.

panels.title: Alert threshold reference

panels.description: Sessions started and shut down in the selected time range. Zero means no matching session lifecycle samples exist for the range.
panels.title: Session lifecycle

panels.description: Telemetry drop rate grouped by bounded drop reason. The zero fallback means no local drops were observed in the selected range.
panels.title: Telemetry drops

panels.description: Exporter/backend failure rate grouped by bounded reason. The zero fallback means no export failures were observed in the selected range.
panels.title: Export failures

panels.description: Redaction failure rate. The zero fallback means no redaction failures were observed in the selected range.
panels.title: Redaction failures

panels.description: Active spans by bounded operation as an SDK pressure signal. Zero means no active spans are exposed or the gauge series is absent; consult observed-event liveness before interpreting it as healthy idle.
panels.title: Active spans by operation

panels.description: Handler error rate grouped by operation and error class. The zero fallback means no handler errors were observed; if event liveness is also zero, the range is idle/unmeasured rather than confirmed healthy.
panels.title: Handler error pressure

panels.description: Latest redaction.failed events first. Safe deterministic fields expose event, category, execution context, error type, trace, and span while raw lines are hidden. trace_id opens Tempo. Empty means no matching failure logs in the selected time range; this is healthy when no redaction failures occurred.

targets.expr: {service_name="observme-pi-extension", event_name="redaction.failed"} | line_format `{"event":{{ printf "%q" .event_name }},"category":{{ printf "%q" .event_category }},"session":{{ printf "%q" .pi_session_id }},"workflow":{{ printf "%q" .pi_workflow_id }},"agent":{{ printf "%q" .pi_agent_id }},"parent_agent":{{ printf "%q" .pi_agent_parent_id }},"agent_run":{{ printf "%q" .pi_agent_run_id }},"error_type":{{ printf "%q" .error_type }},"trace_id":{{ printf "%q" .trace_id }},"span_id":{{ printf "%q" .span_id }}}`

panels.title: Redaction failure logs

panels.description: Latest telemetry.dropped events first. Safe deterministic fields expose event, category, execution context, error type, trace, and span while raw lines are hidden. trace_id opens Tempo. Empty means no matching failure logs in the selected time range; this is healthy when no local telemetry drops occurred.

targets.expr: {service_name="observme-pi-extension", event_name="telemetry.dropped"} | line_format `{"event":{{ printf "%q" .event_name }},"category":{{ printf "%q" .event_category }},"session":{{ printf "%q" .pi_session_id }},"workflow":{{ printf "%q" .pi_workflow_id }},"agent":{{ printf "%q" .pi_agent_id }},"parent_agent":{{ printf "%q" .pi_agent_parent_id }},"agent_run":{{ printf "%q" .pi_agent_run_id }},"error_type":{{ printf "%q" .error_type }},"trace_id":{{ printf "%q" .trace_id }},"span_id":{{ printf "%q" .span_id }}}`

panels.title: Telemetry drop logs

panels.description: Latest export.failed events first. Safe deterministic fields expose event, category, execution context, error type, trace, and span while raw lines are hidden. trace_id opens Tempo. Empty means no matching failure logs in the selected time range; this is healthy when no exporter/backend failures occurred.

targets.expr: {service_name="observme-pi-extension", event_name="export.failed"} | line_format `{"event":{{ printf "%q" .event_name }},"category":{{ printf "%q" .event_category }},"session":{{ printf "%q" .pi_session_id }},"workflow":{{ printf "%q" .pi_workflow_id }},"agent":{{ printf "%q" .pi_agent_id }},"parent_agent":{{ printf "%q" .pi_agent_parent_id }},"agent_run":{{ printf "%q" .pi_agent_run_id }},"error_type":{{ printf "%q" .error_type }},"trace_id":{{ printf "%q" .trace_id }},"span_id":{{ printf "%q" .span_id }}}`

panels.title: Export failure logs

panels.description: Latest trace_context.propagation_failed events first. Safe deterministic fields expose event, category, execution context, error type, trace, and span while raw lines are hidden. trace_id opens Tempo and the panel links to Trace Journey. Empty means no matching failure logs in the selected time range; this is healthy when trace context propagated successfully.

targets.expr: {service_name="observme-pi-extension", event_name="trace_context.propagation_failed"} | line_format `{"event":{{ printf "%q" .event_name }},"category":{{ printf "%q" .event_category }},"session":{{ printf "%q" .pi_session_id }},"workflow":{{ printf "%q" .pi_workflow_id }},"agent":{{ printf "%q" .pi_agent_id }},"parent_agent":{{ printf "%q" .pi_agent_parent_id }},"agent_run":{{ printf "%q" .pi_agent_run_id }},"error_type":{{ printf "%q" .error_type }},"trace_id":{{ printf "%q" .trace_id }},"span_id":{{ printf "%q" .span_id }}}`

panels.title: Trace-context propagation failure logs
